item.title: Mexican cartel drones breach US airspace, are disabled by War Department, Duffy says
item.description: The U.S. military disabled Mexican cartel drones breached American airspace near El Paso, Texas, federal aviation officials announced Wednesday.

item.title: Bondi faces grilling in House Judiciary Committee hearing over Epstein files, weaponization allegations
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi testifies Wednesday before the House Judiciary Committee, where lawmakers are expected to confront her over the DOJ's handl...

item.title: 'GOP' House candidate admits she's actually a progressive in viral video: 'Telling people the truth'
item.description: A candidate for Congress hoping to represent North Carolina's 14th district, Kate Barr, says she is running as a Republican because it is the only pat...

item.title: Vance warns Iran that 'another option on the table' if nuclear deal not reached
item.description: Vice President JD Vance warned Iran that there is "another option on the table" if nuclear deal talks fail, citing President Donald Trump's threats.

item.title: Pritzker joins chorus of Dem governors boycotting White House dinner after snub ignites 'chaos'
item.description: Democratic governors blasted President Trump over disinviting two of their colleagues to a traditionally bipartisan event, leading to a growing chorus...
